description_long: This object is a short sword with a straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a pointed tip. The blade is metallic and has a faceted, polygonal appearance, giving it a stylized, geometric look. The crossguard is wide and rectangular, colored in a bright yellow, providing a clear separation between the blade and the handle. The handle itself is cylindrical, also yellow, with a slightly darker grip section and a rounded pommel at the end. The overall design is simple and functional, with no visible ornamentation or engravings. The color contrast between the blade and the hilt makes the object visually striking and easy to identify.
description: A stylized short sword with a straight, faceted metallic blade, a wide yellow crossguard, and a cylindrical yellow handle with a rounded pommel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the blade, crossguard, and handle, highlighting the sword's symmetrical design.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the blade and the handle, with the crossguard appearing as a narrow bar.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the back of the blade, crossguard, and handle, with no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and handle, mirroring view 1.
